caption: The video appears to be a presentation or lecture on systems thinking and its applications, as indicated by the visual map displayed on the screen. The map is a complex network of interconnected nodes, each representing different concepts such as "awaken," "systems thinking," "model sharing," "buying & selling," and "future of society." These nodes are linked with arrows, suggesting relationships and pathways between the ideas. A person wearing headphones is visible in a small window on the right side of the screen, likely narrating or explaining the content. The background shows multiple browser tabs open, hinting that the presenter might be referencing various sources or materials during the discussion. The overall setting suggests an educational or professional context, possibly a webinar or online course.
